comment: 48yo female, confirmed Hashimoto's thyroiditis (anti-TPO 380 IU/mL positive, anti-thyroglobulin 220 IU/mL positive, diffuse goiter on US, hypothyroidism on levothyroxine 75 mcg daily x 8 years), no current thyroid nodule >1 cm, no personal thyroid malignancy diagnosis. Engine fires RF-AUTOIMMUNE-THYROIDITIS-LYMPHOMA-PREVENTION → routes to PreventionPlan: standard = IND-AUTOIMMUNE-THYROIDITIS-LYMPHOMA-PREVENTION-SURVEILLANCE (TSH q6-12mo, thyroid US q1y, FNA of any dominant or TIRADS-3+ nodule; urgent core-needle biopsy if rapid goiter enlargement or B-symptoms — ~67-80x thyroid MALT/DLBCL risk per Holm NEJM 1985 / Pedersen Histopath 1996); alternative = IND-AUTOIMMUNE-THYROIDITIS-LYMPHOMA-PREVENTION-OBSERVATION (TSH-only follow-up, symptom-driven imaging). Validates v0.3 autoimmune chronic-condition prevention pilot.
